name: Mission Control Runtime
description: Portable ticketed control-plane bundle that governs non-trivial OpenClaw work.

governedTools.label: Always governed tools
governedTools.help: These tools always require an active ticket (aliases are normalized at runtime).

execPolicy.governBackground.label: Govern background exec
execPolicy.governBackground.help: Require a ticket before background host commands run.

execPolicy.governElevated.label: Govern elevated exec
execPolicy.governElevated.help: Require a ticket before elevated host commands run.

execPolicy.governPty.label: Govern PTY exec
execPolicy.governPty.help: Require a ticket before PTY-driven host commands run.

execPolicy.governTimeoutOverSeconds.label: Govern exec over seconds
execPolicy.governTimeoutOverSeconds.help: Require a ticket before host commands with timeout above this threshold run.

execPolicy.governDangerousCommands.label: Govern dangerous command patterns
execPolicy.governDangerousCommands.help: Require a ticket before risky operational commands run.

singleActiveTicketPerSession.label: Single active ticket per session
singleActiveTicketPerSession.help: Block opening a second active ticket in the same session until the first is closed.

requireBoundedClassification.label: Require bounded classification
requireBoundedClassification.help: Block governed work when the active ticket has no bounded classification data recorded.

injectPromptGuidance.label: Inject prompt guidance
injectPromptGuidance.help: Add a brief system-context reminder to use ticket tools for governed work.
